headline: Backend Engineer & Tech Lead — Agentic AI & Automation

faq.question: Who is Hasib Ahmad Bhuyan?
faq.answer: Hasib Ahmad Bhuyan is a Backend Engineer and Tech Lead specialising in scalable API platforms, microservices, and production-grade agentic AI systems. He is based in Uttara, Dhaka, Bangladesh, builds in Python (Django, FastAPI) and Go (Fiber), and currently leads engineering as Tech Lead at Hours Media Ltd.

faq.question: What does Hasib specialize in?
faq.answer: Agentic AI and automation — multi-agent systems, LLM orchestration and chaining (LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI), RAG pipelines and vector search, and self-hosted local AI (including Hermes Agent from Nous Research) — on scalable Python and Go backends with Celery, Redis, and PostgreSQL.

faq.question: What has Hasib built?
faq.answer: Backends for AI SaaS products — Oppora.ai (sales automation), Heimdall (marketing automation), and SailorSearch (an agent-ready search API) — plus a real-time production tracking system and an AI interview agent with structured scoring. He leads architecture, pull request reviews, and cross-team delivery.

faq.question: How can I contact Hasib?
faq.answer: Email hasibahmed1729@gmail.com, visit hasib.tech, or find him on GitHub as Hasib105 and on LinkedIn.
